reference: Hi, I am Jacky. I am really concerned and worried. In June two thousand and eleven, I had a miscarriage; if I am not mistaken, I was four to five months pregnant. My current boyfriend and I are trying to have a baby. We have been having unprotected sexual intercourse since May of last year, but without any success; I am not getting pregnant. Does this mean I will not have children? Recently, this month I had my period twice, very close together, but the second one was not heavy. What does this mean?
text: Hi, I am Jackie. I am really concerned and worried. In June 2011, I had a miscarriage. If I am not mistaken, I was four to five months pregnant. My current boyfriend and I are trying to have a baby. We have been having unprotected sexual intercourse since May of last year, but without any success. I am not getting pregnant. Does this mean I will not have children? Recently, this month I had my period twice, very close together, but the second one was not heavy. What does this mean?
